---
title: "import_resolution.test.ts"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/tests/node/pennyone/import_resolution.test.ts"
loc: 52
complexity: 1
logic_score: 8.75
style_score: 3.87
intel_score: 6.78
overall_score: 5.24
---

## Intent
A functional component of the Corvus Star static analysis matrix.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 8.8/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.9/10
- **Intel [I]**: 6.8/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 0 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [test](file://node:test)
- [describe](file://node:test)
- [it](file://node:test)
- [*](file://node:assert)
- [compileMatrix](file://../../../src/tools/pennyone/intel/compiler.js)
- [FileData](file://../../../src/tools/pennyone/analyzer.js)
- [registry](file://../../../src/tools/pennyone/pathRegistry.js)
- [*](file://fs/promises)
- [*](file://path)

### Exports
- `root`
- `mockResults`
- `graphPath`
- `graph`
- `mainFile`
- `deps`
